title: Malware Detection
description: Designed and evaluated preprocessing pipelines for three malware opcode datasets to uncover discriminative patterns and improve detection accuracy. Trained and validated anomaly-detection models to identify malicious behavior, contributing to more reliable early-threat detection

title: ERC Course Registration Tool
description: Scraped and cleaned data from 5+ school websites, merging information to create a dataset that could be easily filtered to search for a desired class. Created a website which allowed users to interactively filter through the available classes from the merged dataframe as well as check if the classes they selected fulfilled their requirements

title: Power Outage Analysis and Prediction
description: Analyzed and cleaned a large U.S. power outage dataset (1,500+ records, 50+ features) to identify key drivers of outage duration and customer impact across time, geography, and outage causes. Built a predictive modeling pipeline to estimate the number of customers affected at outage onset, supporting earlier situational awareness and prioritization of emergency response and resource allocation. Engineered features and evaluated baseline regression models to establish performance benchmarks, laying groundwork for data-driven improvements in outage mitigation and infrastructure planning.
